name: Whoogle Search
description: A self-hosted, ad-free, privacy-respecting metasearch engine
compose:
name: slashnode-whoogle-search
services:
  web:
    image: benbusby/whoogle-search:1.2.4
    container_name: whoogle-search
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    user: '927:927'
    init: true
    environment:
      EXPOSE_PORT: '6420'
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:6420:6420
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
